messages.content: what are collard greens called in egyptian arabic
In Egyptian Arabic, collard greens are called "ملوخية" (molokhia).
what are vegan vegetables highest in calcium

Some vegan vegetables that are high in calcium include:

1. Collard greens
2. Kale
3. Broccoli
4. Bok choy
5. Spinach
6. Okra
7. Chinese cabbage (Napa cabbage)
8. Watercress
9. Mustard greens
10. Turnip greens

These vegetables can be incorporated into a vegan diet to help meet calcium needs.
what is kale called in egyptian arabic
Kale is known as "ملوخية" (molokhia) in Egyptian Arabic. It is worth noting that molokhia also refers to a popular green leafy vegetable commonly used in Egyptian cuisine.
how much calcium in 100 grams brocolli
In 100 grams of broccoli, there is approximately 47 mg of calcium. Broccoli is a nutritious vegetable that provides a variety of vitamins and minerals, including calcium.
how much calcium in 100 grams bokchoy

In 100 grams of bok choy (also known as pak choi), there is approximately 105 mg of calcium. Bok choy is a great source of calcium and other nutrients, making it a healthy addition to a balanced diet.
how much calcium in 100 grams of okra
In 100 grams of okra, there is approximately 77 mg of calcium. Okra is a nutritious vegetable that provides a variety of vitamins and minerals, including calcium.
what is watercress called in egyptain arabic
Watercress is called "جرجير" (jirjeer) in Egyptian Arabic.
how much calcium in 100 grams watercress
In 100 grams of watercress, there is approximately 120 mg of calcium, making it a good source of this essential mineral.
how much calcium in 100 grams mustard greens
In 100 grams of mustard greens, there is approximately 115 mg of calcium. Mustard greens are a nutritious leafy green vegetable that is a good source of calcium among other essential nutrients.
what are mustard greens called in arabic
Mustard greens are called "ورق الملوخية" (warq al-molokhia) in Arabic.
what are turnpi greens called ine gyptian arabic
Turnip greens are called "سلق" (salq) in Egyptian Arabic.
how much calcium in 100 grams of turnip greens
In 100 grams of turnip greens, there is approximately 190 mg of calcium. Turnip greens are a good source of calcium, as well as other essential vitamins and minerals.
